name: lienwolf
description: Borrower-intent intelligence platform for private & hard money real estate lenders

scripts.db:schema: wrangler d1 execute lienwolf-db --config worker/wrangler.toml --file db/schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute lienwolf-db --config worker/wrangler.toml --file db/seed.sql
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name lienwolf
